name: Agentic Developer MCP
what_it_does: MCP server providing agentic development tools for AI-assisted software engineering. Enables AI agents to manage development workflows, execute code generation tasks, coordinate multi-step development activities, and maintain development context across complex engineering tasks.
use_cases: Orchestrating multi-step software development tasks from engineering agents
Managing development context and state across long-running coding workflows
Coordinating code generation, testing, and review from agentic development pipelines
Building AI-driven development automation for software engineering teams
not_for: Simple single-step code generation (use basic LLM directly)
Teams not investing in agentic development workflows
Production deployments without thorough testing of agent-generated code
best_when: A developer or team wants to build sophisticated agentic development workflows where AI agents coordinate multiple development steps — planning, coding, testing, and iteration.
avoid_when: Your development needs are simple. Agentic orchestration adds complexity — useful for complex multi-step workflows but overkill for simple scripts.

auth.notes: No authentication — local development tool. Integrations with external services may require their own auth.

pricing.notes: Free open source tool from teabranch.

known_agent_gotchas: Agentic development tools can trigger cascading actions — test thoroughly before autonomous use
Code execution capabilities may be included — review what actions the tools can perform
Community tool with moderate adoption — verify stability before integrating into development pipelines
teabranch is focused on agentic developer tooling — emerging area with evolving patterns
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local development tool. Review capabilities for code execution or file modification. Development tools with file write access should be restricted to intended project directories.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local development tool. Review file system access scope. No external credentials.
